name: Superdreadnought Rail Cannon Juggernaut Liebe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>級</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>砲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>列</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>車</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジャガーノート・リーベ
name_jp_tl: Superdreadnought Gun Turret Train Juggernaut Liebe
desc:
3 Level 11 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Superdreadnought Rail Cannon Juggernaut Liebe" by using 1 Rank 10 Machine Xyz Monster you control as material. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; it gains 2000 ATK/DEF, also for the rest of this turn, you can only declare an attack with this card. During each Battle Phase, this card can make attacks on monsters up to the number of materials it has +1.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
